name: Shelf Floor Lamp with USB Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Light up your space in simple and sleek style with the Shelf Floor Lamp with USB from Room Essentials™. This black floor lamp features three legs and a built-in shelf to help display your vases, books, photo frame and more. Plus, the round shade adds a modern touch and casts soft illumination. Designed with a one-way on/off light setting, it's easy to operate with the rocker switch.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
